title: gastridium lendigerum subsp. scabrum
intro: Gastridium lendigerum subsp. scabrum, also known as rough meadow-grass or rough meadow-grass Gastridium, is a plant species in the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Gastridium lendigerum subsp. scabrum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues and soothe skin irritations. Gastridium lendigerum subsp. scabrum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and poultices, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine.
